content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be re-framed as hierarchical curiosity filtering modules: only memory traces that trigger sustained prediction error (the core signal that drives curiosity-driven reinforcement learning) are retained and prioritized for incremental active learning, pruning low-information static memories to avoid catastrophic forgetting and context bloat. This creates a self-sustaining memory cycle where curiosity shapes what the agent remembers, and selective memory makes future active learning more efficient.
